artwork.title: James Jim Lake Jr
artwork.description: A digital painting I did on a trollhunters character James Lake Jr. known as Jim,he's a resilient and complex character who puts his friends and family before his own needs

artwork.title: Hanako's pop
artwork.description: This is a digital lasso art piece I did on an anime TBHK the main character is intriguing and funny, Hanako is a really deep character despite his humor his past is very dark.

artwork.title: Mia's piece
artwork.description: I decided to capture how I view myself through digital art, using the lasso art style I captured images of myself in a comic way as my self portraits.

artwork.title: Nancy Wheeler
artwork.description: From Stranger Things, I admire Nancy Wheeler a female character who shows great strength both physically and emotionally, she is my favorite character of all time, I captured her wielding her weapon of choice bravely, her guns.

music.title: Its Outside the Realm – Big Giant Circles
music.description: Energetic and atmospheric track influencing abstract visual themes.

music.title: What Once Was – Her's
music.description: Dreamy, nostalgic sound connected to soft emotional visuals.

music.title: Entombed – Deftones
music.description: Dark, immersive tone influencing moody and atmospheric artwork.

animations.title: Untitled Animation
animations.description: Tools used, motion study, and creative process behind this piece.
